name: White Cake with Sticky Brownie Base
recipeIngredient: 50 g unsalted butter, plus extra for greasing
300 g white chocolate, broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to gas mark 4.
2. Lightly grease a 20cm/8in springform pan in.
3. In a small non-stick pan, gently heat butter and sugars until the chocolate melts. Stir until the mixture is smooth. Remove from heat and let it cool.
4. In a bowl, beat egg and vanilla extract. Add to the cooled mixture. Sift flour and baking powder into the mixture and mix well. Pour into the prepared tin.
5. Bake for 15 minutes until the outside of the brownie is crisp and beginning to shrink away from the sides, but the center is still soft to the touch. Let it cool.
6. To make ice cream, melt chocolate. Whip cream until it just holds its shape, then whisk in the cold custard. Stir in chocolate until the mixture is thick, smooth, and well blended. Pour onto the cooled brownie and tilt the pan to level the top.
7. Melt plain chocolate and drop 12 neat blobs onto the ice cream, about 3 cm from the edge.
8. Open freeze for 4 hours.
9. Remove from freezer and dust with cocoa powder.
